title: Resinous Post-Workout Kosher Chives Hash
description: A hearty, wok-hei infused dish featuring sautéed chives and kosher-friendly ingredients, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large earthenware bowl over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add chopped chives and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add flaxseeds, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Push the onion and chive mixture to one side of the bowl.
Add kosher sausage to the other side of the bowl and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
Add beaten eggs to the bowl and scramble until cooked through.
Mix the egg and sausage mixture with the onion and chive mixture.
Serve hot, garnished with thinly sliced scallions.
